scripts.build: pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && pnpm --filter @hesper/persistence build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); for (const p of [path.join(process.cwd(),'dist/packages'), path.join(process.cwd(),'dist/__tests__')]) fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && pnpm --filter @hesper/persistence build && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit
